headline: Issued by Backed Finance; Solana SPL token located; GitHub repo identified; Arbitrum deployment unconfirmed in discovery sources
short_headline: Backed Finance xStocks; 1 Solana address identified

findings.text: Solana block explorer search: one address surfaced—MtCJMNfa98DNNk2zvsH8t34Xq6VVdpoDY94qY3spump (SPL token mint for xStocks, identified in Solflare).

Official deployments doc: docs.xstocks.fi located but not fully accessible; legal documentation at assets.backed.fi accessible via references; specific deployed contract addresses for Arbitrum and additional Solana tokens not yet enumerated from public-facing docs.

No public audit links recorded in per-protocol context; BlockEden.xyz report (Feb 2026) indicates zero public smart contract audits from major firms (CertiK, OpenZeppelin, Trail of Bits, etc.); underlying SPL program on Solana has been audited but xStocks token contracts themselves lack public audit records.

GitHub repository github.com/backed-fi/backed-token-contract identified; contains ERC20-based token contracts for Ethereum-compatible chains (MIT licensed); main branch accessed; no deployment artifacts (hardhat-deploy, foundry broadcast) with specific addresses enumerated in README or readily available.
Multi-chain enumeration: Solana (1 address found); Arbitrum (listed in per-protocol chains but no contract addresses surfaced from web searches or docs so far—marked for follow-up in next slice).

No factory pattern detected for xStocks themselves (each individual stock—AAPLx, TSLAx, NVDAx, SPYx, etc.—appears to be a separate SPL token mint); enumeration of individual token addresses deferred pending deeper on-chain exploration.

Role taxonomy: Backed Assets (JE) Limited classified as issuer/owner; Backed Finance AG as parent company and service provider; regulated custodians (InCore Bank, Maerki Baumann, Alpaca Securities) identified as external custody actors; no explicit governance/DAO token or admin multisig enumerated yet.

Evidence ledger: Solana SPL token address traced to Solflare public block explorer sourcing; GitHub repo traced to public GitHub org; documentation sources (backed.fi, docs.xstocks.fi, assets.backed.fi) traced to official domain links; no unverified snippet-only sightings in this discovery run.

rationale.verdict: Discovery completed for available public corpora: official website (backed.fi) and documentation domains (docs.xstocks.fi, assets.backed.fi) fetched; Backed Finance GitHub organization and backed-token-contract repository located; Solana deployment confirmed via Solflare (MtCJMNfa98DNNk2zvsH8t34Xq6VVdpoDY94qY3spump); Arbitrum presence noted in per-protocol chains but specific contracts not yet discovered. Total: 1 on-chain contract address catalogued; issuer, custodian, and parent company identified off-chain. Next evaluation slices will focus on control, governance, and exit mechanisms for identified addresses.

evidence.shows: Official Backed Finance homepage; confirms xStocks product, ecosystem partnerships (Kraken, Bybit, Solana, Chainlink, Kamino, Jupiter, Raydium), and links to product documentation.

xStocks legal classification as tracker certificates; issuer structure (Backed Assets JE Limited, Jersey-based, owned by Backed Finance AG, Swiss-based); regulatory approvals (Jersey FCA, Liechtenstein FMA); custodian identities (InCore Bank, Maerki Baumann, Alpaca Securities).
Solana block explorer token page identifying MtCJMNfa98DNNk2zvsH8t34Xq6VVdpoDY94qY3spump as official Solana contract address for Tokenized Stocks.
GitHub repository containing token contracts for Backed Finance AG; ERC20-based, upgradeable tokens with permit and delegateTransfer functions; supports tokenized stocks products.
xStocks launched June 30, 2025 by Backed Finance; 60+ U.S. equities as SPL tokens; issued under Swiss DLT Act; regulatory compliance via KYC gating.
xStocks deployed on Solana as SPL tokens; Token Extensions utilized for Metadata Pointer, Scaled UI Amount Config (rebasing), Pausable Config, and Permanent Delegate authority.

Market analysis of xStocks; confirms 58% market share in tokenized stocks; zero public smart contract audits from major firms (CertiK, OpenZeppelin, Trail of Bits, Halborn, Quantstamp); identifies custodian risk, Backed Finance operational single point of failure, and weekend liquidity drops.

unknowns: D2: Arbitrum deployment addresses not surfaced from docs.xstocks.fi or block explorer searches; FMA-approved prospectus references contract addresses but assets.backed.fi is geographically restricted.

D4: GitHub backed-token-contract repo does not contain hardhat-deploy or foundry broadcast artifacts with per-network deployment addresses; Ethereum/Arbitrum contract addresses inferred from source but not pinned to a commit SHA.
D5: Arbitrum chain listed in per-protocol.chains; no contract addresses enumerated for Arbitrum from accessible sources; requires on-chain explorer search in next slice.

D6: Individual xStock token contract addresses (AAPLx, TSLAx, NVDAx, SPYx, etc.) on Solana not enumerated; Solflare identifies one central address (MtCJMNfa98DNNk2zvsH8t34Xq6VVdpoDY94qY3spump) but individual stock tokens may be separate mints; requires clarification.

protocol_metadata.about: <cite index="40-1,40-2">xStocks are issued by Backed Assets (JE) Limited, a Jersey-based issuer fully owned by Backed Finance AG, a Swiss-based tokenization provider, operating under an EU-compliant prospectus approved by the FMA in Liechtenstein.</cite> <cite index="23-6,23-7,23-8">For every real share held in custody, Backed mints exactly one SPL token on Solana—so 1 Tesla share equals 1 TSLAx token, maintaining a strict 1:1 backing ratio.</cite> <cite index="22-1,22-2">xStocks are fully tokenized representations of publicly traded U.S. equities, with each xStock token corresponding 1:1 to a real share held in custody by a regulated entity.</cite>
